001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.controller;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.IssueReportRequest;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto.IssueReportSummary;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueReport;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.IssueReportService;
007import java.net.URI;
008import java.util.List;
009import java.util.UUID;
010import org.springframework.http.HttpStatus;
011import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
012import org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity;
013import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.DeleteMapping;
014import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.GetMapping;
015import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PathVariable;
016import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PostMapping;
017import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.PutMapping;
018import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestBody;
019import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestMapping;
020import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RequestParam;
021import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.ResponseStatus;
022import org.springframework.web.bind.annotation.RestController;
023
024import static org.springframework.hateoas.server.mvc.WebMvcLinkBuilder.linkTo;
025import static org.springframework.hateoas.server.mvc.WebMvcLinkBuilder.methodOn;
026
027/**
028 * REST controller exposing issue report operations for authenticated users.
029 */
030@RestController
031@RequestMapping("/issue-reports")
032public class IssueReportController {
033
034  private final IssueReportService issueReportService;
035
036  /**
037   * Creates a controller delegating issue report operations to the service layer.
038   *
039   * @param issueReportService service providing issue report operations.
040   */
041  public IssueReportController(IssueReportService issueReportService) {
042    this.issueReportService = issueReportService;
043  }
044
045  /**
046   * Returns summaries of issue reports owned by the currently authenticated user.
047   *
048   * @param sort sort key/direction parameter (passed through to the service).
049   * @return list of report summaries.
050   */
051  @GetMapping(
052      value = "/mine",
053      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
054  )
055  public List<IssueReportSummary> getMyReports(
056      @RequestParam(defaultValue = "last_modified") String sort) {
057    return issueReportService.getReportsForCurrentUser(sort);
058  }
059
060  /**
061   * Creates a new issue report for the currently authenticated user.
062   *
063   * @param request request payload describing the issue report.
064   * @return response containing the created report and a {@code Location} header.
065   */
066  @PostMapping(
067      consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE,
068      produces = MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON_VALUE
069  )
070  public ResponseEntity<IssueReport> createReport(@RequestBody IssueReportRequest request) {
071    IssueReport created = issueReportService.createReport(request);
072    URI location = linkTo(methodOn(IssueReportController.class)
073        .getReport(created.getExternalId()))
074        .toUri();
075    return ResponseEntity.created(location).body(created);
076  }
077
078  /**
079   * Returns a single issue report by external identifier.
080   *
081   * @param externalId report external ID.
082   * @return issue report entity.
083   */
084  @GetMapping("/{externalId}")
085  public IssueReport getReport(@PathVariable UUID externalId) {
086    return issueReportService.getReportByExternalId(externalId);
087  }
088
089  /**
090   * Updates an existing issue report.
091   *
092   * @param externalId report external ID.
093   * @param request request payload describing updates to apply.
094   * @return updated issue report entity.
095   */
096  @PutMapping("/{externalId}")
097  public IssueReport updateReport(@PathVariable UUID externalId, @RequestBody IssueReportRequest request) {
098    return issueReportService.updateReport(externalId, request);
099  }
100
101  /**
102   * Deletes an issue report by external identifier.
103   *
104   * @param externalId report external ID.
105   */
106  @DeleteMapping("/{externalId}")
107  @ResponseStatus(HttpStatus.NO_CONTENT)
108  public void deleteReport(@PathVariable UUID externalId) {
109    issueReportService.deleteReport(externalId);
110  }
111
112
113}
